channel.title: Welcome! on Theo's Park

item.title: Hello World
item.description: I just made a website yay! Hugo is a life saver.
item.content: I just made a website yay! Hugo is a life saver.

item.title: About Me
item.description: My name is Theo, and I am studying computer science and philosophy at Purdue University. I will update this later lol
item.content:
My name is Theo, and I am studying computer science and philosophy at Purdue University.

I will update this later lol

item.title: My Projects
item.description: Hi! You can find descriptions and links to my projects here!
